kept.text:
6 ans.

Le marché actions américain vient de clôturer son meilleur mois depuis 6 ans 🥂

Google et Broadcom progressent de 34%,
Amazon progresse de 27%,
AMD de 74%, Nvidia de 14%,

Et j’en passe…

Et, comme d’habitude, cette hausse fulgurante s’est produite au moment où personne ne s’y attendait.

Beaucoup de portefeuilles sont désormais sur des plus hauts (dont le mien 😇)

À l’exception peut être de ceux des vendeurs de peur, qui sont restés en cash depuis plusieurs années en attendant le krach et en essayant de faire paniquer ceux qui avaient déjà commencé à investir.

L’éternel recommencement 🔄

Achetez des actifs de qualité,

Conservez-les le plus longtemps possible.

Et tirez les leçons nécessaires de ce mois d’avril exceptionnel que nous venons de vivre.

kept.text:
📢 𝐉𝐔𝐒𝐓 𝐈𝐍: $AVGO Broadcom Unveils Wi-Fi 8 & 10G PON Chips for Mass Broadband Market

👉 𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬:

➤  Broadcom launches 𝐖𝐢-𝐅𝐢 𝟖 chips and optimized 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐚𝐬𝐬 𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐭.

➤  Introduces 𝐁𝐂𝐌𝟔𝟖𝟓𝟔𝟓 SoC with integrated 𝟏𝟎𝐆 𝐏𝐎𝐍 support.

➤  New dual-band radios 𝐁𝐂𝐌𝟔𝟕𝟏𝟒𝟐 & 𝐁𝐂𝐌𝟔𝟕𝟏𝟗𝟐 reduce cost and footprint.

➤  Combines fiber 𝐛𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐡𝐚𝐮𝐥 with Wi-Fi 8 for multi-gigabit performance.

➤  Delivers higher 𝐜𝐚𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲, lower latency, and improved reliability.

➤  Integration lowers 𝐩𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫 consumption and bill of materials costs.

➤  Aims to accelerate global shift from 𝐜𝐨𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐫 and cable to fiber networks.

tweet.text:
🔔 Direkt içeriden net bilgi vereyim.

Bugüne kadar tüm donanım üreticileri Broadcom çip (SoC) içeren onaylanmış projelerde değişiklik yapabilmek için fix $250k ödüyordu.

Bu sabah Broadcom ile yaptığımız toplantıda artık bu ücreti almayacaklarını söylediler.

Nedeni çok ilginç.

Neredeyse piyasada bildiğiniz tüm oyuncular, uçmuş fiyatlar yüzünden, ürettikleri cihazlarda RAM kapasitesi düşürme yoluna gidiyorlar.

Broadcom da bu isteklere cevap verebilmek ve eski müşterilerini kaybetmeme refleksiyle bu sabit ücreti artık tamamen kaldırmış durumda.

Garip zamanlar.

Alacağınız telefon, konsol, bilgisayar gibi cihazlar varsa fiyatların daha da artma ihtimaline karşı elinizi çabuk tutsanız iyi edersiniz.

Bellek tarafındaki maliyet baskısı hala geçmiş değil.

$AVGO $QCOM $MU $SNDK

tweet.text:
$TSLA $NVDA $GOOGL $AVGO 장중 간단 분석

테슬라 : 계속 분석해드렸지만 볼린저밴드 중심선 지지를 받고 있을 분 당장 더 쏘기는 힘듭니다.

엔비디아 : 엔비디아는 성장세가 더 강해지기 힘듭니다. 좋은 주식이지만 시총 1위이고 무거워서 느린 우상향 종목이 될 것 입니다.

구글 : 실적 잘 나왔고 앞으로 방향성도 좋아서 더 갑니다.

브로드컴 : 구글이 TPU에 돈 더 많이 쓰고 메타도 더 많이 씁니다. 좋습니다.

엔비디아 빼고는 각 종목들이 일별로 나올 수 있는 주가 무빙도 다 예측 가능합니다. '구독'을 하게 된다면 매일 관심 종목들에 대한 간단 분석으로 여러분의 마음을 안심시켜 드리겠습니다.

정확한 분석을 원한다면 저를 팔로우 하세요!

#TSLA #테슬라
#NVDA #엔비디아 
#GOOGL #구글 
#AVGO #브로드컴

author.name: Florida Man
author.description: Day trader and crypto enthusiast

tweet.text:
Weekly AI Update

GOOGLE BETS BIG ON ANTHROPIC  
$GOOG plans to invest $10B in Anthropic, with up to $30B more tied to performance, valuing the AI firm at $350B as competition in AI coding intensifies. The deal expands cloud and chip partnerships with $AVGO, while Anthropic also secures funding from $AMZN.

OPENAI-MICROSOFT DEAL RESET 
OpenAI capped its 20% revenue share payments to $MSFT while ending reciprocal payments, loosening exclusivity and enabling multi-cloud distribution across rivals like $AMZN and $GOOG. The shift signals growing competition as OpenAI diversifies infrastructure and enterprise reach.

SNOWFLAKE TARGETS AI CONTROL LAYER 
$SNOW is expanding its AI stack with Cortex Code and Snowflake Intelligence to position itself as the “control plane” for enterprise AI, integrating across platforms like Databricks and Salesforce. The move intensifies competition with $MSFT and others to own governed data infrastructure powering autonomous AI agents.

tweet.text:
🚨 S&P 500 Just Hit a New All-Time High to Close April 2026!
The index closed at 7,210.24 (+1.02% on the final day of the month)
→ April surged +10.4%, the strongest month since November 2020 🔥
Big Tech and AI led the charge: Nvidia ~+20%, Broadcom +39%, Amazon +29%… Nasdaq also hit a fresh ATH near 24,715–24,892.
Now the market officially enters May — the classic season of the saying:
“Sell in May and go away”
📌 Historical facts:
Since 1950, the May–October period has delivered average returns of only ~2-3%, significantly lower than November–April (~6-7%). Many years saw higher volatility or corrections.
But what about 2026?
•  Bull market remains strong
•  Q1 earnings beat expectations
•  AI is still the long-term driver → Many analysts believe “Sell in May” may not apply this year.
Are you holding long-term, taking partial profits, or keeping cash for a dip?
Drop your strategy in the comments! 👇
#SPX #SP500 #SellInMay #BullMarket #AI #StockMarket #CryptoMacro #Investing
